---
name: Feature request
description: Suggest an improvement or new idea for Mompy
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## What do you want to improve?

Describe the idea.

## Why is this useful?

Explain how it helps beginners, the interface, missions, audio, packaging, or the project.

## Suggested behavior

Describe how it should work.

## Screenshots, sketches, or references

Add anything visual if useful.

## Additional context

Anything else that may help.
